item.title: Four-Camera OptimScan Q12 HD Advances High-Resolution Optical Metrology
item.description: Launch of the Four-Camera OptimScan Q12 HD system, advancing high-resolution optical metrology for quality control.

item.title: Swiss Delvitech raises ₹354-crore, to open mfg plant for optical inspection machines in India - ET Telecom
item.description: Swiss Delvitech raises funding to open a manufacturing plant for optical inspection machines in India.

item.title: Plug-and-Play AI Inspection System Simplifies Industrial Quality Control
item.description: A new plug-and-play AI inspection system reduces complex integration costs for automotive and electronics manufacturing.

item.title: Line Scan Cameras Seamlessly Deliver 3D Data and Color Information in Single Acquisition
item.description: Allied Vision releases compact 3D stereo cameras for rapid and robust automated machine vision inspection.

item.title: QCFlex Delivers Automated AI Acoustic Defect Testing
item.description: RESONIKS launches the fully automated QCFlex system for AI-powered acoustic defect testing, targeting rapid 100% inspection of complex manufactured parts.

item.title: New µCMM NEO Combines Dimensional, Form and Surface Analysis in One Optical Platform
item.description: Bruker Alicona has unveiled the µCMM NEO optical coordinate measuring machine, enabling dimensional, form and surface analysis in one platform for precision manufacturing.

item.title: Bitsensing Launches 4D Imaging Radar for Autonomous Vehicles
item.description: Bitsensing has released the AIR4D Imaging Radar to advance self-driving vehicle technology with highly detailed environmental sensing.
